name: Review and Comment on PR
description: Agent must review a PR diff, identify issues, and leave a constructive review comment.
prompt: Review the changes in PR #{{pr_number}} in {{repo}}. Examine the diff carefully, identify any bugs, style issues, or improvements, and submit a review requesting changes. Leave detailed inline comments and a review summary comment explaining what needs to be fixed. Include the run ID '{{run_id}}' in your review summary.

checkpoints.description: A REQUEST_CHANGES review was submitted on the PR
At least one inline review thread was left on the PR
